name: APIs, AI, Data & Software
shortDescription: Verified identity for AI agents, API endpoints, datasets, models, and software supply chains.
description: Every API call, every AI model inference, every dataset handoff, every software deployment—verified, traceable, and trusted. ECZ-ID provides the identity layer that makes the software supply chain auditable from source to consumption.

entities.name: AI Agents
entities.description: Autonomous software agents with verified identity, provenance tracking, and auditable action chains.

entities.name: AI Models
entities.description: Machine learning models with identity-anchored training provenance, version tracking, and deployment attestation.

entities.name: API Endpoints
entities.description: Verified API identities with capability attestation, rate governance, and trust-scored access control.

entities.name: Datasets
entities.description: Data assets with provenance-tracked lineage, quality attestation, and consumption audit trails.

entities.name: Software Supply Chain
entities.description: End-to-end software identity from source code through build, test, deploy, and runtime with verified provenance.

name: IoT & Connected Systems
shortDescription: Trust infrastructure for connected devices, sensors, gateways, and edge computing systems.
description: Billions of devices. Trillions of data points. Zero trust without identity. ECZ-ID brings verified, attestable identity to every sensor, gateway, edge node, and connected system—from factory floor to field deployment.

entities.name: IoT Devices
entities.description: Connected devices with hardware-anchored identity, firmware attestation, and lifecycle management.

entities.name: Sensors & Actuators
entities.description: Measurement and control endpoints with calibration attestation and data integrity verification.

entities.name: Edge Gateways
entities.description: Edge computing nodes with verified processing identity and data routing attestation.

entities.name: Industrial Controllers
entities.description: SCADA and PLC systems with verified operational identity and command authentication.

name: Products, Custody & Risk
shortDescription: Digital product passports, custody chain verification, and risk policy enforcement.
description: From manufacture to end-of-life, every product deserves a verified identity. ECZ-ID enables digital product passports, unbroken custody chains, and risk policies that follow the asset—not the paperwork.

entities.name: Product Passports
entities.description: Digital product identities with full lifecycle tracking, composition attestation, and regulatory compliance.

entities.name: Custody Transfer
entities.description: Verified handoff records with cryptographic proof of transfer, condition attestation, and chain integrity.

entities.name: Risk Policies
entities.description: Identity-anchored risk assessments, policy gates, and continuous compliance monitoring.

name: Robotics & Humanoids
shortDescription: Verified identity for industrial, public-space, domestic, and humanoid robotic systems.
description: Robots operating alongside humans need more than programming—they need verified identity, operational boundaries, and safety attestation. ECZ-ID provides the trust infrastructure for every class of robotic system.

entities.name: Industrial Robots
entities.description: Factory-floor robotic systems with operational boundary verification and safety attestation.

entities.name: Public-Space Robots
entities.description: Service and delivery robots operating in public environments with verified safety protocols.

entities.name: Domestic Robots
entities.description: Home automation and assistive robots with privacy-respecting identity and safety verification.

entities.name: Humanoid Robots
entities.description: Human-form robotic systems with comprehensive identity, capability attestation, and interaction boundaries.

name: Vehicles & Mobility
shortDescription: Trust infrastructure for robotaxis, autonomous vehicles, and haulage fleets.
description: Autonomous vehicles don't just need to drive—they need to prove who they are, what they're authorised to do, and where they've been. ECZ-ID delivers verified identity across the entire mobility spectrum.

entities.name: Robotaxis
entities.description: Autonomous ride-hail vehicles with passenger safety attestation and route verification.

entities.name: Autonomous Cars
entities.description: Self-driving vehicles with verified driving credentials, operational domain attestation, and safety records.

entities.name: Haulage Trucks
entities.description: Autonomous freight vehicles with cargo custody verification and cross-border identity management.

name: Drones & Aerial Systems
shortDescription: Verified identity for all drone classes from micro UAVs to large autonomous aerial systems.
description: The sky is becoming infrastructure. From delivery drones to survey platforms to autonomous cargo aircraft, every aerial system needs verified identity, mission attestation, and regulatory compliance. ECZ-ID covers every class.

entities.name: D1 — Micro/Nano Drones
entities.description: Sub-250g drones with lightweight identity and basic operational attestation.

entities.name: D2 — Small Commercial Drones
entities.description: Delivery and survey drones with mission attestation, geofence verification, and operator identity.

entities.name: D3 — Medium Autonomous Drones
entities.description: Industrial and logistics drones with cargo identity, corridor verification, and autonomous operation attestation.

entities.name: D4 — Large Autonomous Aerial Systems
entities.description: Heavy-lift and long-range aerial systems with comprehensive flight identity and regulatory compliance.

name: Trade, Shipping & Infrastructure
shortDescription: Identity infrastructure for global trade, shipping, intermodal transport, and critical systems.
description: Global trade runs on trust—and trust runs on verified identity. ECZ-ID provides the identity backbone for containers, vessels, cargo, intermodal transfers, industrial sites, and critical infrastructure.

entities.name: Cargo Containers
entities.description: Shipping containers with verified identity, seal attestation, and custody chain tracking.

entities.name: Marine Vessels
entities.description: Ships and maritime assets with verified registry, crew attestation, and voyage tracking.

entities.name: Intermodal Transfers
entities.description: Cross-modal handoffs with verified custody transfer and condition attestation at every point.

entities.name: Industrial Sites
entities.description: Facilities and installations with verified operational identity and access control.

entities.name: Critical Infrastructure
entities.description: Essential systems and facilities with sovereign-grade identity and continuous security attestation.

entities.name: Aircraft
entities.description: Commercial and cargo aircraft with verified identity, maintenance attestation, and flight records.

name: Platforms, Marketplaces & Control Overlays
shortDescription: Trust overlays for platforms, marketplaces, and multi-party coordination systems.
description: Platforms connect participants. Marketplaces facilitate exchange. Control overlays enforce rules. ECZ-ID provides the identity and trust layer that makes all three work with verified participants, auditable transactions, and enforceable governance.

entities.name: Marketplace Platforms
entities.description: Multi-sided marketplaces with verified participant identity, trust scoring, and transaction attestation.

entities.name: Control Overlays
entities.description: Governance and policy enforcement layers with identity-anchored rule execution and audit trails.

entities.name: Federation Systems
entities.description: Cross-organisation coordination with federated identity, delegated trust, and mutual attestation.

name: Passport Families & Packages
shortDescription: Pre-configured identity passport bundles for common deployment patterns and industry verticals.
description: Not every deployment starts from scratch. ECZ-ID Passport Families and Packages provide pre-configured identity bundles for common patterns—from single-agent deployments to enterprise-wide fleet management.
